chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.517 of 2024 Syed Rehan Qasim Versus Syed Zulfiqar Ali & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.2539/24 2. For order son Misc. No.2540/23 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.03.2024 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Sandhu for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel, on instructions, submits that he would not press this petition along with listed applications. Dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
